data.body:
## Context
In a single atomic commit, migrate all dev-team artifacts out of plugins/dso/ to project-local directories and update all internal references. These changes must land in one commit because check-referential-integrity.sh fires on any intermediate state where a reference is updated before its target file is moved.

## Files to move
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/doc-writer-dogfood-result.md → docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md → docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/test-failure-subagent-strategy.md → docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_RESEARCH.md → docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_SESSION.md → docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md → plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ (stays in plugin, special case)
- plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md → docs/findings/
- plugins/dso/docs/archive/debugging-research-2026-03-18.md → docs/archive/
- plugins/dso/tests/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh → tests/skills/
- Remove empty plugins/dso/tests/ directory

## References to update in *.md and *.sh
1. CLAUDE.md: Update File placement rule: plugins/dso/docs/designs/ → docs/designs/ (project artifacts) or plugins/dso/skills/<skill>/docs/ (plugin-local)
2. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (3 occurrences): cascade-replan-protocol.md path
3. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/replan-user-prompt.md: cascade-replan-protocol.md path
4. plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md: playwright-cli-spike-report.md → docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md
5. plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md: plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/ → docs/designs/<uuid>/
6. plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md: DESIGN_ROOT and all design path references (7+ occurrences) → docs/designs
7. plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md: example text with old path → docs/designs/
8. plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md (2 occurrences): test-failure-subagent-strategy.md path

## .test-index update - ALL 63 entries
sed -i.bak 's|plugins/dso/tests/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh|tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh|g' .test-index && rm .test-index.bak
Verify count unchanged: wc -l .test-index

## Testing Mode
GREEN (verified by RED test from Task 2)

## Note on allowlist
plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ allowlist registration is Story S2 (c73a-1918) responsibility. This task only creates the directory.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
- [ ] Grep gate returns no matches
  Verify: ! git grep -r 'plugins/dso/docs/designs|plugins/dso/docs/findings|plugins/dso/docs/archive' -- '*.md' '*.sh' 2>/dev/null
- [ ] cascade-replan-protocol.md exists at new path
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ directory exists
  Verify: test -d plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs
- [ ] docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ directories exist
  Verify: test -d docs/designs && test -d docs/findings && test -d docs/archive
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/designs/ is empty or absent
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/docs/designs || test -z "$(ls -A plugins/dso/docs/designs/)"
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/findings/ is empty or absent
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/docs/findings || test -z "$(ls -A plugins/dso/docs/findings/)"
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/archive/ is empty or absent
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/docs/archive || test -z "$(ls -A plugins/dso/docs/archive/)"
- [ ] plugins/dso/tests/ directory absent or empty
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/tests || test -z "$(ls -A plugins/dso/tests/)"
- [ ] tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] .test-index no longer references old test path (all 63 entries updated)
  Verify: ! grep 'plugins/dso/tests/test-sprint-skill-step10' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index references new test path
  Verify: grep -q 'tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
